result.stdout:
dotnet-update-all-tools is a tool for upgrade all dotnet tools, update all global dotnet tools by default, and you can set `--local` option for local tools
Options:
	 --local              	 update all local dotnet tools
	 -v/--version         	 output version information
	 -h/--help            	 output help information
